applications.label_text: OLD TOM DISTILLERY Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey 45% Alc./Vol. (90 Proof) 750 mL Old Tom Distillery, Louisville, Kentucky GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
CEDAR RIDGE Straight Rye Whiskey 50% Alc./Vol. (100 Proof) 750 mL Cedar Ridge Spirits, Seattle, Washington Government Warning: Please drink responsibly.
